overview.short: Buddhavanam is a tourism project in Nagarjuna Sagar, Telangana created by the Telangana Tourism Development Corporation.
overview.description: Buddhavanam is a tourism project in Nagarjuna Sagar, Telangana created by the Telangana Tourism Development Corporation. The project was sanctioned by the Government of India viz., Integrated Development of Nagarjunasagar as part of Lower Krishna valley Buddhist circuit with a view to attract large number of domestic and foreign tourists particularly from the South-East Asian countries.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Vijayapuri (North)
topPlaces.description: Vijayapuri (North) is a census town in Nalgonda district in the Indian state of Telangana. It Consists of two colonies, Hill Colony and Pylon Colony.

topPlaces.name: Nagarjuna Sagar Dam
topPlaces.description: Nagarjuna Sagar Dam is a masonry dam across the Krishna River at Nagarjuna Sagar, which straddles the border between Nalgonda district in Telangana, and Palnadu district in Andhra Pradesh. The dam provides irrigation water to the districts of Nalgonda, Suryapet, Khammam, Bhadradri Kothagudem districts of Telangana and also Krishna, Guntur, Palnadu,, Prakasam, and parts of West Godavari districts of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Vijayapuri South
topPlaces.description: Vijayapuri South is a village in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Macherla mandal of Gurazala revenue division.

items.note: Vijayapuri (North) is a census town in Nalgonda district in the Indian state of Telangana. It Consists of two colonies, Hill Colony and Pylon Colony.

Nagarjuna Sagar Dam is a masonry dam across the Krishna River at Nagarjuna Sagar, which straddles the border between Nalgonda district in Telangana, and Palnadu district in Andhra Pradesh. The dam provides irrigation water to the districts of Nalgonda, Suryapet, Khammam, Bhadradri Kothagudem districts of Telangana and also Krishna, Guntur, Palnadu,, Prakasam, and parts of West Godavari districts of Andhra Pradesh.
Vijayapuri South is a village in Palnadu district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is located in Macherla mandal of Gurazala revenue division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Buddhavanam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Buddhavanam is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (114 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Buddhavanam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Buddhavanam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Buddhavanam?
faq.a: Stays in Buddhavanam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Buddhavanam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vijayapuri (North), Nagarjuna Sagar Dam, Vijayapuri South.
